description: Describes one or more of your network interfaces.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: DescribeNetworkInterfaces reveals detailed network configuration including private/public IPs, subnets, security groups, and attachment details, aiding adversaries in mapping the network topology.
By examining network interfaces, attackers can identify services attached to specific IPs and understand network exposure for further targeting.

securityImplications: Attackers might use DescribeNetworkInterfaces to map network topology, identify public-facing resources, and plan lateral movement within the VPC.
